title: Der schweigende Engel
writer: Harald Reinl, Maria von der Osten-Sacken
actors: Josefin Kipper, Robert Freitag, Gustav Waldau
plot: Purely by chance, ballet superstar Sylvia Verena discovers that Angelika Helmer has real talent. The child, however, cannot speak and hasn't been able to since falling down as a young child.
